Title: Retro Synthwave Neon Clock Sunset Street Art Tee
Description:
Embrace the vibrant nostalgia of the 80s with this eye-catching Synthwave graphic tee. Featuring a glowing neon clock set against a breathtaking sunset skyline, this design captures the dreamy, electric energy of retro-futurism.

The soft, gradient wash of pinks and purples evokes a perfect lo-fi vibe, making this shirt a standout piece for any collector of synthwave, cyberpunk, or vaporwave aesthetics.

✨ Style & Comfort:
Crafted for comfort and durability, this tee features a relaxed fit that is perfect for festivals, casual outings, or adding a pop of vibrant color to your streetwear wardrobe. The premium material feels great wash after wash.

🎁 Ideal For:
This shirt makes an incredible gift for music lovers, graphic design enthusiasts, retro culture fans, or anyone who appreciates bold, nostalgic artwork. It's perfect for concert merchandise or themed parties.
